about.title: The best accommodations and information for your vacation
about.description: Since 2022, we connect travelers with the best accommodations in Concepción del Uruguay and the Entre Ríos coast. Our team works to help you discover the most authentic corners of the region, with up-to-date information and experiences verified by our community.
